import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './LandingPage.css'; function LandingPage() { return (
{/* Navbar */}
ILES Internship System {/* */}
System Login {/* [cite: 4] */}
{/* Hero Section */}

Bridging the Gap Between Education and Industry {/* [cite: 2] */}

The Internship Logging & Evaluation System (ILES) provides a unified platform for students, supervisors, and faculty to manage internship lifecycles with precision and ease {/* [cite: 3] */}

15k+ Users {/* [cite: 5] */}
200+ Partners {/* [cite: 6] */}
50+ Institutions {/* [cite: 7] */}
{/* Comprehensive Management Section */}

Comprehensive Management {/* [cite: 8] */}

ILES automates the tedious parts of coordination, allowing everyone to focus on what matters: the learning {/* [cite: 9] */}

Structured Weekly Logs {/* [cite: 10] */}

Students can easily document activities, skills learned, and challenges encountered {/* [cite: 11] */}

Supervisor Portals {/* [cite: 12] */}

External workplace supervisors review logs, provide feedback, and rate progress {/* [cite: 13] */}

Advanced Analytics {/* [cite: 14] */}

Academic supervisors gain a bird's-eye view of all student placements, identifying trends and potential issues early {/* [cite: 15] */}

Compliance & Security {/* [cite: 16] */}

Built-in validation ensures all necessary documentation, contracts, and letters are correct {/* [cite: 17] */}

Automated Reminders {/* [cite: 18] */}

Never miss a deadline. Automated notifications alert students to pending logs and supervisors to reviews {/* [cite: 19] */}

Standardized Evaluation {/* [cite: 20] */}

Multi-point evaluation ensures fair and consistent assessment across all departments and industries {/* [cite: 21] */}

{/* Roles Section */}

For Students {/* [cite: 22] */}

  • Centralized placement tracking {/* [cite: 23] */}

For Workplace Supervisors {/* [cite: 24] */}

  • Interface for log reviews {/* [cite: 25] */}

For Academic Supervisors {/* [cite: 26] */}

  • Visual overview {/* [cite: 27] */}
  • Automated grading tools {/* [cite: 28] */}
  • Placement management {/* [cite: 29] */}
  • Reporting tools {/* [cite: 31] */}
{/* Trusted Institutions */}

TRUSTED BY LEADING INSTITUTIONS {/* [cite: 32] */}

Universal University {/* [cite: 33] */} State Tech Institute {/* [cite: 34] */} Metropolitan College {/* [cite: 35] */} Global Academy {/* [cite: 37] */}
{/* Contact Section */}

Ready to Streamline Your Internship Program? {/* [cite: 38] */}

{/* [cite: 39] */} {/* [cite: 40] */} {/* [cite: 52] */}

Have questions about the system or need help? Our academic support team is here to help {/* [cite: 41] */}

Email Support: support@iles.com {/* [cite: 44] */}

Technical Hotline: 1-555-ILES-HELP {/* [cite: 46, 48] */}

Office: Admin Campus {/* [cite: 49, 50] */}

{/* Footer */}

ILES {/* [cite: 53] */}

Empowering students and educational institutions with structured internship management and evaluation tools {/* [cite: 51] */}

Quick Links {/* [cite: 54] */}

Support {/* [cite: 55] */}

Made with Love {/* [cite: 56, 57] */}

); } export default LandingPage;
